hyperedges.label: Form Validation Stack (shadcn Form + React Hook Form + Zod)

nodes.label: Vercel Functions (Stateless)
nodes.rationale: Treat as stateless + ephemeral; use Blob or marketplace integrations for preserving state; Edge Functions are deprecated.

nodes.label: Frontend Design Principles (Anti-Generic)
nodes.rationale: Avoid generic AI-generated aesthetics; commit to bold aesthetic directions; typography, motion, spatial composition, backgrounds are key differentiators.

nodes.label: Copy-Paste Component Philosophy
nodes.rationale: Components are copied into project — you own the code. Not an npm package dependency. Enables deep customization without being constrained by package APIs.

nodes.label: bet365 Visual Style (Green and Yellow on White)
nodes.norm_label: bet365 visual style (green and yellow on white)
